ASD爱仕达316不锈钢不粘炒锅采用三层钢结构与耐高温不粘涂层，结合了不锈钢的耐用与不粘锅的便捷。蜂窝纹理设计省油防粘，食材加热均匀，不怕铁铲和钢丝球刮擦，适合烹饪各种坚硬食材。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OTO Footplus Massager FP-100
programme.desc: OTO Footplus Massager offers a 3D foot massage with a detachable airbag compression system for calves, thighs, arms, and abdomen. Its 3-part sole massage mechanism provides targeted relief, with three intensity levels and five massage modes for a customized experience. It also features a two-level heat function for the soles. OTO Footplus 按摩器提供 3D 足部按摩，并配有可拆卸的气囊压缩系统，适用于小腿、大腿、手臂和腹部，带来全身按摩体验。其三段式足底按摩机制提供针对性缓解，三种按摩强度和五种按摩模式可根据需求定制体验。此外，还配有两档足底加热功能。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Morries 6.5L Yuan Yang Hot Pot + 5” Retro Fan Bundle
programme.desc: Enjoy hotpot with 2 different soup bases with the Morries Yuan Yang hot pot. Its 2200W high power ensures rapid boiling, bringing 2L of water to boil in just 9 minutes. With its innovative G-type dual-loop heating tube, enjoy fast and even heat distribution for your hotpot meals at home. Get yours now and experience cool breezes with a retro fan while you enjoy a hotpot meal with your loved ones. Morries鸳鸯锅让你实现火锅自由！创新G型双环加热管设计，让热能分布均匀。鸳鸯锅设计，可同时享用两种不同汤底，也可以一边烤肉，一边煮汤。2200W高功率确保快速沸腾，左右独立温控系统，让您精准调节加热温度。套组附带可调节的无线桌面风扇。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - LAC Joint Protect
programme.desc: The jelly form LAC Joint Protec contains glucosamine, chondroitin, type 2 collagen, anti-inflammatory herbs, which help repair cartilage and relieve joint inflammation. It tastes good, is easy to take and convenient. Start ""refueling"" the cartilage and synovial fluid early so that the joints can be used for a longer time! 果冻形态的关节保健品，含葡萄糖胺、软骨素、第2型胶原蛋白、抗炎草本等关节保健营养素，有助于修复软骨和缓解关节发炎症状，味道好，容易服用又方便。提早开始给软骨和滑液“加加油”，关节才能用得久、用得顺！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kinohimitsu Wellsure
programme.desc: A plant-based protein nutritional drink that ensures a balanced intake of nutrients, promoting visible improvements in muscle health, immune resilience, eye health, and digestion. 一种植物性蛋白全营养饮，确保摄取均衡营养，有助于显著改善肌肉健康、增强免疫力、促进眼部健康和消化功能

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - HOTO Electric Spin Scrubber
programme.desc: The Hoto Kitchen Spin Scrubber combines power and precision in a compact, cordless design made for everyday kitchen cleaning. Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly. 一款无线高扭矩清洁器，为轻松，深层清洁而设计。它可伸缩手柄与6种可替换刷头，轻松清洁地板，瓷砖，浴缸及狭小角落。简约奢华设计，适合每个人使用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Thomson Probiotic
programme.desc: Thomson ProbioGut is a premium probiotic supplement designed to support digestive health, boost immunity, and promote overall well-being. Formulated with two clinically researched Japanese probiotic strains—it helps improve gut flora, regulate bowel movements, and maintain a healthy body weight. Thomson ProbioGut 是一款优质的益生菌补充剂，专为支持消化健康、增强免疫力和促进整体健康而设计。采用两种临床研究认证的日本益生菌菌株— 有助于改善肠道菌群、调节排便，并维持健康的体重

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Nature's Farm® Krill Oil 180s
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Krill Oil is made with SUPERBA 2™ krill oil, one of the most researched krill oils, backed by over 130 clinical trials. It is pure, sustainable, and traceable from catch to capsule. Rich in omega-3s, astaxanthin, phospholipids, and choline, it supports heart, brain, liver, eye, skin, and joint health. Nature's Farm来自南极的磷虾油，富含优质Omega-3脂肪酸和虾红素, 有助于维持胆固醇水平、维护心 脏、大脑和关节健康！ 人体对磷虾油的吸收率更高，没有难闻的鱼腥味，软胶囊更容易吞服，一天2颗有助于维护整体健康！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Furi Knife Bundle Set
programme.desc: Slice, dice, and chop like a pro with our kitchen knives! 厨房刀片如同专业大厨一般娴熟！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Nutripack Snow Fungus
programme.desc: Health+ Nutripack Snow Fungus is a non-cook fungus, ready to eat in just one minute. It contains 100% pure natural organic white fungus with no preservatives or chemical additives added. Health+雪颜银耳 ，免煮即食只需1分钟即可享用。100% 纯天然有机银耳，不添加防腐剂或化学添加剂

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Philips Azur Steam Iron
programme.desc: The Philips Azur 8000 Series Steam Iron delivers powerful performance with OptimalTEMP technology, ensuring that no fabric will be burned. The intelligent temperature control guarantees no scorching, allowing you to iron both horizontally and vertically with ease. Philips Azur 8000系列蒸汽熨斗有OptimalTEMP免调校温控技术，保证不会把面料烫坏。智能温控保证不熨焦，让您水平、垂直熨烫一机搞定！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Krafter Purple Magic Sheet
programme.desc: South Korea’s no. 1 Home Shopping product! A multi-purpose cleaning sheet that works wonders by effectively removing grease, stains, mould and odors on all surfaces! 韩国电视购物频台爆款！这万能布能有效地清理顽固的污渍， 油脂和气味！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - TIGER EDGE SLB-A10U Food Blender
programme.desc: A premium innovation—patented 45° angled blades crush fruits, frozen foods, and ice while keeping flavor. The angled vortex ensures smooth blends, with 10 speeds for any texture. Lightweight Tritan cup and removable blades make cleaning easy, while the compact, stylish design delivers full functionality for daily use. 全新上市，专利 45° 斜角刀片，轻松粉碎水果、冷冻食材与冰块，完美保留食材原味。倾斜漩涡设计，让食材混合顺滑，10 段速度随心调节。轻调理杯、可拆刀座，清洗方便，操作简单，功能全面又时尚。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - LAC Brain Speed
programme.desc: Enhance memory, focus, and mental clarity with Phosphatidylserine (PS), Ginkgo, DHA, and Acetyl L-Carnitine. Supports circulation, nerve health, and cognitive performance—just one tablet a day to stay sharp. Perfect for students, busy professionals, and seniors. 富含高浓度PS与脑部所需重要营养，全面激活记忆力、专注力与思维清晰度。结合银杏叶、DHA与乙酰左旋肉碱，促进脑部循环、维持神经活力与专注表现, 适合18岁以上的学生、上班族或长者，每天一颗，为大脑充电.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set
programme.desc: The Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set makes meal prep and long-term storage easy, locking in freshness and flavour. Tupperware's No. 1 freezing containers feature a speedy-freeze design and flexible material for easy unmolding. Available in multiple sizes, there's a perfect container for every freezer storage need. Tupperware 冷冻保鲜 5 件套让备餐和长期储存变得便捷，有效锁住食物的新鲜度。作为 Tupperware 畅销第一的冷冻容器，它采用快速冷冻设计与柔韧材质，冷冻后轻松脱模。多种尺寸组合，能轻松满足各种冷冻储存的需求。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Q’SAI Knee Supporter Collagen
programme.desc: QSAI Knee Supporter Collagen, cumulative sales exceed 50 million pieces as of Jan 2024, delivers highly absorbable collagen peptides, Hyaluronic Acid, and Chondroitin to nourish joints and cartilage, relieve joint pain. Its tasteless, odorless powder blends effortlessly into any food or drink, making it perfect for daily joint care, especially for those who prefer not to take pills. Q’SAI 膝之助胶原蛋白粉 QSAI 护膝胶原蛋白粉，截至2024年1月累计销量已超过5000万盒，富含高吸收性的胶原蛋白肽、玻尿酸和软骨素，有助滋养关节和软骨、缓解关节疼痛。其无味无臭的粉末状配方，可轻松加入任何食物或饮料中服用，是日常关节护理的理想之选，尤其适合那些不想服用药片的人士。

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Heston: Masterclass
programme.desc: Heston Blumenthal demonstrates how to make some of his favourite dishes in a masterclass.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Dubai Team Challenge
programme.desc: In world food week, the contestants head to the souks of Dubai and create a banquet to be served to 36 Emirati.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Elimination Challenge 11
programme.desc: In Dubai's Atlantis hotel Ossiano Restaurant Kitchen, six competitors fight to stay in competition.

programme.desc: The amateur chef teams are split into Chinese and Mexican kitchens and need to deliver lunches.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Elimination Challenge 12
programme.desc: The losing team from the previous challenge were faced with a two-round elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Masterclass 11 - Paris Tour
programme.desc: Emma and Daniel are whisked off on a guided gastronomic tour of Paris with Matt Preston.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Service Challenge
programme.desc: The last seven amateur chefs must cook for their own families at Craig's Royal Hotel in Ballarat.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Elimination Challenge 13
programme.desc: The remaining 6 chefs are asked to cook their dreams for the future, and present it on a plate.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Josie Bones
programme.desc: Series 1 second runner up Chris Badenoch opens his restaurant, Josie Bones, to the red and blue teams..

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Elimination Challenge 14
programme.desc: Rishi, Lucy and Samira must replicate Darren Purchase's raspberry rhubarb ginger chocolate dessert.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Masterclass: Victoria
programme.desc: Gary makes pot toast and friands and Matt makes chocolate muffins filled with caramel.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Finals Week Mystery Box Challenge
programme.desc: For finals week the last five amateur chefs cook a Mystery Box using their favourite ingredient.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Elimination Challenge 15
programme.desc: Each top five contestant are assigned with one chef mentor to cook their dishes in 90 minutes.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Finals Week Service Challenge
programme.desc: It's service challenge in The Atlantic restaurant with chef Donovan Cooke running the pass.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Elimination Challenge 16
programme.desc: It's another elimination, the final trio will be chosen after a tiered cook off.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - MasterClass 13
programme.desc: In the last masterclass, Gary teaches the chefs to make lemon souffle.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Grand Finale
programme.desc: It's the grand finale of 2013 and our top 22 has been whittled down to three home cooks battling it out.

programme.desc: The hit local cooking competition is back, bigger and better than ever before.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Whole Chicken
programme.desc: The Top 24 contestants face a sudden death challenge to find who will go through to the Top 16.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Loaf
programme.desc: The Top 16 contestants move into the MasterChef mansion on Auckland's North Shore.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Takeaways
programme.desc: The Top 15 contestants must cook three classic takeaway dishes.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - The Navy
programme.desc: The Top 14 contestants make canapés for 130 guests on board the HMNZS Canterbury.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Moo Chow Chow
programme.desc: The Top 13 face their spiciest challenge yet: to cook two dishes for guest chef Che Barrington.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - La Cigale
programme.desc: A Mystery Box Challenge has the cooks baking from the heart.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #1

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Frozen, Canned & Packaged
programme.desc: The remaining cooks compete in teams for a gourmet sausage challenge in celebration of Oktoberfest.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #2
programme.desc: MasterChef judges Josh, Simon and Ray cook three simple but tasty dishes.

programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. programme.title: Banana Joe
programme.desc: Banana Joe lives in a tropical village in Africa which is unaffected by modern life. One day he discovers he needs a permit to operate his boat so goes off to the big city to get one. On the way he witnesses television, crooks and many delights for the first time as well as falling in love.

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: The muscular Hercules performs his labors, sails with the Argonauts, and romances the fair Iole.

programme.title: River Of Death
programme.desc: An adventurer decides to go in search of a lost city in the Amazon jungle, and is joined by a motley crew of other people with reasons of their own. But to their horror, instead of treasure, they find a Nazi doctor occupying the lost city who is still doing his experiments on people.

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep3 - EP103
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.desc: A mystery is afoot, toys have gone missing and it's up to the Shaq Pack to figure out what happened.

programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Sports - EP119
programme.desc: In this episode, we will travel through the wonderful world of sports. We will learn the physical and mental benefits of practising a sport or physical activity. We will talk about the value of perseverance, training, and the importance of knowing how to win and how to lose. We will learn about different sports and disciplines and how to show respect to our opponents.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Behaving on the Street and Minding Traffic Signs - EP104
programme.desc: Nova will invite children to a new expedition to become super pedestrians. Together, they will discover how they should behave in public spaces or streets. Curious will teach us the correct way to cross the street, know the traffic lights and traffic signals. They will also learn that the car is a very fun place that has rules to follow to enjoy and stay safe.

programme.desc: In this episode, we will learn about the value of love. We will understand that when we have love in our hearts, we care about the well-being of others, so we make them happy. Respect is a big part of love and when love is in our heart, there is no place for negative feelings.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Burpin’ Babies / Backpack Payback - EP118
programme.desc: Kent’s youth serum works a little too well and turns the gang into screaming babies. The serum soon wears off – sort of – now they’re adults trapped in baby bodies and Von Bolt doesn’t know whether to obey or burp them. / When the Anti-Matters steal JD's backpack and discover the portable ALVA, they unwittingly cause Edison's hologram to disappear. The Secret Lab Kids must concoct a plan to retrieve the backpack before Edison's lost forever.

programme.title: Mellodees - The Grand Old Duke Of York - EP27
programme.desc: What a great day! It’s time for an outdoor stretch. Can you sing ‘The Grand Duke of York’? Then join the march with Dee on the streets!

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep4 - EP104
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Argo's World
programme.desc: Join Marie and Argo in this exciting STEM edutainment mixed-media series as they venture through Cyberspace and make discoveries about the world through historical figures and notable real-world personalities! Special guests include a founding father of the Internet, a NASA astronaut, a top robotics expert, and clever folks from M.I.T!

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie’s play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood; trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - God's Gang | Alien Mayhem! | Episode 1, 2, 3
programme.desc: God’s Gang faces insane challenges - from stopping a mad scientist to battling aliens and saving blue whales.

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - Gods Gang | The Cotton Candy Conspiracy | Episode 1
programme.desc: Gods Gang

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - Gods Gang | Blue Whales and Reptilian Ruses | Episode 2
programme.desc: God's Gang embarks on an underwater mission to rescue blue whales, only to encounter an alien ambush. The team faces unexpected challenges while trying to infiltrate a clandestine blue whale party. Suspense builds as they attempt a daring rescue operation.

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Chuck the Cherry Picker helps Harvey
programme.desc: Harvey needs a helping hand harvesting fruits from the tall trees! Troy selects the best truck to help: Chuck the Cherry Picker!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Frank the Fire Trucks saves Gary
programme.desc: Uh-oh, Gary the Garbage truck is on fire! Troy selects the best truck to help him: Frank the Firetruck!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Amber the Ambulance helps Ethan
programme.desc: Ethan the Dumptruck feels sick; he ate too much candy! Troy selects the best truck to help him: Amber the Ambulance!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Ethan The Dumptruck collects the bouncy balls
programme.desc: Pickle dumped a tonne of bouncy balls on the motorway! Troy selects the best truck to help her: Ethan the Dumptruck!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Dane's Wrecking Ball causes mayhem
programme.desc: Dane's wrecking ball accidentally fell off and knocked Frank! Troy selects the best truck to help him: Hector the Helicopter!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Christopher getsstuck in cement
programme.desc: Christopher fell asleep and woke up covered in concrete! Troy selects the best truck to help release him: Dane the Crane!

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - BUILDING BLOCKS, FALLING TOWERS – ROOKIE AND THE MOLE
programme.desc: Rookie finds a large box full of building blocks. He starts building towers, but they keep collapsing whenever he looks away. He discovers a hole in the ground with nothing inside, but curious as ever, he presses a button to inflate himself and blows into one of the holes, causing the troublemaker, a friendly mole, to pop out. Rookie catches his new friend , and together they set up an amazing building.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - HAPPY BIRTHDAY TOOO YOUUUUU! ROOKIE AND THE BIRTHDAY BASH
programme.desc: In the final episode of the second season, Rookie hears suspicious noises and begins to investigate. But he can‘t find the source! When he finally opens a door, he is greeted by a confetti cannon - a surprise birthday party! All his friends are gathered around a cake with two candles, and at the little turtle’s count, they all join in singing ‘Happy Birthday’ together!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Show do Jacarelvis
programme.desc: O Jacarelvis tenta fazer um show quando uma abelhinha aparece em seu caminho, esse imprevisto pode se tornar uma grande parceria!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Papa Tudo
programme.desc: Ao som de um gostoso rock vamos todos comer direitinho, o Jacarelvis e amigos mostram como é bom e gostoso comer de tudo um pouco e como e importante os legumes e frutas nas refeições.

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Escovo os dentes
programme.desc: Um divertido reggae feito para ajudar as crianças durante a escovação dos dentes, tornando esse momento divertido e prazeroso.

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Minha Escola
programme.desc: Uma homenagem bem didática ao segundo lar de muitas crianças!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Da Aqui
programme.desc: Aprenda sobre as frutas e alguns de seus benefícios ao ritmo de um Rock'n Roll!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Castigo
programme.desc: Vamos tentar entender esse tal de castigo ao som de um divertido blues !

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Mico Tuco
programme.desc: O Mico Tuco te cutuca nesse rockabilly que não vai deixar ninguém parado!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Tem que limpar
programme.desc: Tudo que suja, molha ou quebra precisa de alguém pra ajeitar, não é mesmo? O Jacarelvis e seus amigos mostram como ajudar a mamãe e o papai de uma forma divertida e segura.

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacare Careca
programme.desc: Uma divertida cantiga que brinca com a sonoridade do nome dos animais.

programme.title: LMN's - LMN's - Submarino
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, Chip y sus amigos caen a un lago donde son recogidos por la nave espacial de un átomo de sodio, que los lleva a Sodia, una ciudad submarina. Allí, los átomos de sodio y cloro viven un largo conflicto. El cloro quiere unirse al sodio para formar moléculas de cloruro de sodio, mientras que los átomos de sodio prefieren permanecer juntos. La patrulla de antimateria entra en contacto con el cloro y les propone proporcionarles rifles para dominar al sodio y así obligarlos a molecularizarse, pero Chip se burla de la antimateria y logra que el cloro y el sodio dejen de ser enemigos, restableciendo la paz en el mundo submarino.

programme.title: LMN's - LMN's - La tormenta
programme.desc: Dentro de un viejo molino de viento, en medio de una fuerte tormenta, Chip y sus amigos esperan que pase y continúan su camino. Afuera, bajo el viento tempestuoso, la patrulla de antimateria le comunica al Dr. No que ya han encontrado al niño. El malvado científico confía en que esta vez no fallarán. Pero cuando el viento amaina, Chip idea una estrategia y deja a la antimateria encerrada en el molino, mientras él y los átomos siguen adelante.

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - Beach Rescue
programme.desc: Zitron deploys his shark minions to scare the crowd at the beach! Rodeo and Booster must save summer!

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - The Sign
programme.desc: The ice cream sign's disappeared! This can only be Zitron's handy work. Rodeo, Booster and Dane merge to stop the thief.

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - Super Fire Truck
programme.desc: Frank is teaching Robo and Booster the basics of a firetruck when Zitron starts a fire using fireworks. Time to merge!

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - The Pumpkin Pie Stand
programme.desc: It's Halloween! Zitron spooks Carrie and throws pies at everyone at the farm. It's time to stop the mischief.

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - Halloween Tricks
programme.desc: Rodeo and Booster’s friends dress up for Halloween, but Zitron gets in the way of the fun. Robo to the rescue.

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they're learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash
programme.desc: Tom loves caring for his friends; they can always count on Tom to tow them back to his car wash, where they're guaranteed to leave sparking!

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city’s sewers transform into Indiana Jones’ white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you’ve entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports

programme.title: Ebb and Flo

Flo doesn’t think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn’t think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb’s world. Ebb and Flo’s home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn’t Be Better!

programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: The Cube Australia - EP 2
programme.desc: Hosted by Andy Lee,, The Cube Australia sees competing pairs have nine lives to complete seven games, each worth an increasing amount of money, as they move closer to the huge jackpot. With key moments filmed using state-of-the-art bullet time’ 3D time-freezing technology, it is more than a regular game show. It brings blockbuster visuals and Hollywood high tension direct to your living room. Will anyone have what it takes to beat the Cube?

Can they beat their way to the top of The Chef’s Line?

programme.title: Food Tales S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Food Tales explores the incredible life stories of Singapore's local hawker heroes featured in the annual food and music extravaganza: GastroBeats. With a diverse mix of influences stemming from waves of immigration to a tiny island, Singapore's culinary landscape represents the beating heart of the nation.

programme.title: Planet Action S4 - EP 1
programme.desc: Planet Action takes you behind the scenes of the best action movies released. This show is a sci-fi, cowboy, world-destruction, action-combo that will literally blow your mind!

programme.desc: All new blender solution, which integrates the functions of juicer, soymilk and cooking! 搅拌后直接在同一个机器里料理的搅拌料理机，还提供多功能模式

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - La Gourmet Flame Electric Cooker
programme.desc: La Gourmet Flame Electric Cooker This La Gourmet Flame Electric Cooker provides you with the best of both worlds by combining a hot pot and grill in one appliance. Enjoy versatile meal preparation, whether you’re simmering soups or grilling meats and vegetables! 这款La Gourmet 火焰电饭锅将火锅和烧烤炉结合一体。为您提供两全其美的享受。无论您是煮汤还是烧烤肉类和蔬菜，都能享受多功能的膳食准备！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OTO Footplus Massager FP-100
programme.desc: OTO Footplus Massager offers a 3D foot massage with a detachable airbag compression system for calves, thighs, arms, and abdomen. Its 3-part sole massage mechanism provides targeted relief, with three intensity levels and five massage modes for a customized experience. It also features a two-level heat function for the soles. OTO Footplus 按摩器提供 3D 足部按摩，并配有可拆卸的气囊压缩系统，适用于小腿、大腿、手臂和腹部，带来全身按摩体验。其三段式足底按摩机制提供针对性缓解，三种按摩强度和五种按摩模式可根据需求定制体验。此外，还配有两档足底加热功能。

Respect is a big part of love and when love is in our heart, there is no place for negative feelings.

They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep1 - EP1
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Love - EP120
programme.desc: In this episode, we will learn about the value of love. We will understand that when we have love in our hearts, we care about the well-being of others, so we make them happy. Pets must also be treated with love and respect. The first step to accepting that we are unique is by loving ourselves. Respect is a big part of love and when love is in our heart, there is no place for negative feelings.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Generosity and Friendship - EP105
programme.desc: In this new episode of Kids' Planet, Nova will invite the children on a new expedition towards friendship. Together, they will learn about loyalty, respect and understanding. Curious will help us to know how generous people behave, discover empathy, and something very important: how to share with people who need it.

programme.desc: The Shaq Paq is challenged to a million dollar charity race, but all is not as it seems.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Futile Attraction / Skin Deep - EP119
programme.desc: When Kent gets zapped by an electro-magnetic coil, he becomes a living magnet and tries to use his newfound “magnetic personal” to impress a girl he likes. / The Secret Lab Kids give Von Bolt an upgrade complete with prosthetic skin and now, looking quite human, Von Bolt ends up a top model destined for runway greatness.

programme.title: Mellodees - ABC's Song - EP1
programme.desc: Learn the alphabet while you dance and sing-a-long with Dee!

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep5 - EP105
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie’s play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood; trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - God's Gang | Love is in the Airhole | Episode 3
programme.desc: Gods Gang

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - God's Gang | What's Cooking | Episode 4
programme.desc: Gods Gang

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - Gods Gang | Mystery Ally in the Flames | Episode 5
programme.desc: A forest trip turns into chaos when wildfire strikes! With no tech, the gang must unite to survive. Just when hope fades, a glowing hero appears. Who is it?

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - Gods Gang | Trials of KungFuda | Episode 6
programme.desc: A forest in flames. A rising fear. Enter Kungfuda, the mystery kicker who pushes God’s Gang to unlock their true power. Can the gang overcome fear and awaken as true Forest Guardians before darkness consumes it all?

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Troy the Digger Train
programme.desc: Billy the Bulldozer's trapped in the tunnel! Teddy turns Troy into a digger to rescue his poor friend.

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Troy the Demolition Train
programme.desc: Little Tina is trapped under a building! Teddy and Troy waste no time and devise a plan to rescue her.

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Troy Scissorhands
programme.desc: Billy and Taylor need help clearing the tracks; they're full of overgrown weeds. Teddy transforms Troy into a giant pruning train.

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Troy the Lifeguard
programme.desc: Henry has fallen into the lake and needs urgent help! Troy transforms into a lifeguard to rescue his friend.

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Troy the Film Director
programme.desc: Tony needs someone to film his daring stunt and enlists Troy's help. Teddy transforms him into a camera rig!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Nadar
programme.desc: Glub, glub, glub! Aprenda os estilos de natação e os cuidados com a água na hora de nadar!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Tambem sou um animal
programme.desc: Somos todos animais, e se temos os nossos bichinhos, não podemos deixar de cuidar deles com carinho!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Quem eu sou
programme.desc: Uma brincadeira musical sobre nossas confusas relações de parentesco!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Barulhinho bom
programme.desc: Um rock que nos ensina que a música pode ser feita por qualquer um a qualquer hora!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Brincar
programme.desc: Nada de ficar parado! Mais que brinquedos, para brincar é preciso muita imaginação e energia!Nada de ficar parado!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Nana, Girafinha
programme.desc: Depois do agito, deixe a criançada relaxar ao som de uma gostosa bossa-nova!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarelvis 02
programme.desc: O mundo fica ainda mais divertido com a ajuda dos amigos do Jacarelvis!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Banho eu vou tomar
programme.desc: Agora ficou fácil dar o banho das crianças com essa animada canção!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - O Lixo e o meu tesouro
programme.desc: Uma aventura pirata que ensina sobre geração de lixo e reciclagem! Arrá! Iourrou!

programme.title: LMN's - LMN's - Altamira
programme.desc: Chip y los átomos entran en una cueva llena de pinturas en las paredes. Una puerta bloquea el paso a la cueva en un lugar donde se apilan células de elementos químicos y un horno. Siguiendo las indicaciones de las pinturas y con la ayuda del libro de química de Chip, descubre que debe mezclar y fusionar varios elementos para crear unos zapatos de vidrio con los que pueda caminar sobre un suelo lleno de ácido, de modo que la puerta se levante y pueda seguir el camino. Cuando las antimaterias intentan seguirlo, mientras mezclan productos químicos, estos les aplastan la nariz.

programme.title: LMN's - LMN's - La carga
programme.desc: Un transporte cargado de nitratos se dirige a la Torre Negra para que el Dr. No prepare explosivos. Chip se cuela en el transporte con la intención de ser llevado a su destino, pero al darse cuenta de la carga, hace todo lo posible para evitar que caiga en manos del malvado científico. Así, con la ayuda de átomos de bromo prisioneros, logra destruir el transporte y su peligrosa carga.

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - Snow Rescue
programme.desc: Zitron joins a friendly snow fight between the cars, but soon uses his Zitronic to trap them in ice cubes!

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - The Basketball Game
programme.desc: Zitron derails a fun basketball game between the cars. Rodeo and Booster transform into Robo to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - UFO Invasion
programme.desc: A UFO steals everything on its path in Car City! Robo teams up with Rocky to stop the UFO and Zitron.

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - The Strongest Truck
programme.desc: Zitron challenges the cars to a strength contest, but turns Marley into the Hulk, and he's completely out of control!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they're learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash - Tom's Car Wash - Fresh & Clean
programme.desc: Baby Frank's been playing at the paint shooting range as in covered in it! Tom gets him all shiny again.

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash - Tom's Car Wash - Muddy Puddles
programme.desc: Baby Hector's spent the afternoon jumping in puddles; the mud got his blades stuck! Time for a trip to the carwash.

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash - Tom's Car Wash - The Beehive
programme.desc: Jeremy's crashed into a beehive and is covered in honey! Tom helps him get rid of the sticky stuff.

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash - Tom's Car Wash - Rusty Chuck
programme.desc: Chuck’s Cherry picker arm is rusty and stiff. He goes to Tom’s Car Wash to get cleaned up and oiled up!

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash - Tom's Car Wash - The Playdate
programme.desc: Baby Amber got all dirty while playing with Baby Matt. Tom giver her an emergency carwash and a polish.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city’s sewers transform into Indiana Jones’ white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you’ve entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green’s new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he’s the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb’s eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn’t think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn’t think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb’s world. Ebb and Flo’s home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn’t Be Better!

programme.title: Cyboars
programme.desc: Part Machine, Part Boar, All Hero!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.
